modelNotes.en: Static preview annual program cycle content sourced from the RITE research package's operating_model.annual_cycle. Spanish translations are model-drafted and unreviewed; see documentation-review.md.
modelNotes.es: Contenido estatico del ciclo anual del programa basado en operating_model.annual_cycle del paquete de investigacion de RITE. Las traducciones al espanol son generadas por modelo y no revisadas.

body.en: Partner networks help select participating teachers. Organizers confirm travel and schedule, recruit and match host families, build the school-visit schedule, and plan community and Rotary activities.
body.es: Las redes de socios ayudan a seleccionar a los docentes participantes. Los organizadores confirman viajes y horarios, reclutan y emparejan familias anfitrionas, arman el calendario de visitas escolares y planifican actividades comunitarias y rotarias.

period.es: De mediados de enero a mediados de febrero

body.en: Teachers of English from Panama and Argentina live with Wichita-area host families, visit a variety of schools, observe classroom practices, participate in Rotary and community activities, and share their own professional and cultural perspectives.
body.es: Docentes de ingles de Panama y Argentina viven con familias anfitrionas del area de Wichita, visitan diversas escuelas, observan practicas de aula, participan en actividades rotarias y comunitarias, y comparten sus propias perspectivas profesionales y culturales.

body.en: Wichita-area educators are selected and develop the seminar curriculum, prepare print and digital resources, and coordinate with Panamanian schools and Rotary partners.
body.es: Se selecciona a educadores del area de Wichita, quienes desarrollan el curriculo del seminario, preparan recursos impresos y digitales, y coordinan con escuelas panamenas y socios rotarios.

period.es: Junio y julio, vacaciones de verano

title.en: Outbound program (about four weeks, including a two-week seminar)
title.es: Programa de envio (unas cuatro semanas, con un seminario de dos semanas)

body.en: Wichita-area teachers travel to Panama, visit schools, share teaching resources and materials, and conduct a practical two-week seminar for teachers of English while collaborating with and learning from local educators.
body.es: Docentes del area de Wichita viajan a Panama, visitan escuelas, comparten recursos y materiales didacticos, y dictan un seminario practico de dos semanas para docentes de ingles, colaborando y aprendiendo de educadores locales.

body.en: Teachers present their experiences to Rotary clubs, share classroom strategies with colleagues, maintain professional connections, and apply what they learned in their home schools.
body.es: Los docentes presentan sus experiencias a los clubes rotarios, comparten estrategias de aula con colegas, mantienen conexiones profesionales y aplican lo aprendido en sus escuelas de origen.

sourceNote.en: Combines verified public reporting with synthesized description of typical follow-through.
sourceNote.es: Combina informacion publica verificada con una descripcion sintetizada del seguimiento tipico.
